mapper.select:
SELECT DELIVERY_ID AS deliveryId, TO_CHAR(SENT_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS occurredAt, DELIVERY_MODE AS deliveryType, DELIVERY_STATUS AS deliveryStatus, TOP_FINDING AS title, DELIVERY_DETAIL AS message, ACTOR_USER_ID AS target, SLACK_STATUS AS slackStatus, MAIL_STATUS AS mailStatus, WEBHOOK_STATUS AS webhookStatus FROM COMTNADMINNOTIFICATIONDELIVERYHIST
ORDER BY SENT_AT DESC, DELIVERY_ID DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT ACTIVITY_ID AS activityId, TO_CHAR(HAPPENED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS recordedAt, ACTION_CODE AS actionCode, DETAIL_TEXT AS summary, ACTOR_USER_ID AS actorId, TARGET_TEXT AS target FROM COMTNADMINNOTIFICATIONACTIVITYHIST
ORDER BY HAPPENED_AT DESC, ACTIVITY_ID DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNADMINNOTIFICATIONDELIVERYHIST ( DELIVERY_ID, SENT_AT, ACTOR_USER_ID, DELIVERY_MODE, FINDING_COUNT, SLACK_ENABLED, MAIL_ENABLED, WEBHOOK_ENABLED, SLACK_CHANNEL, MAIL_RECIPIENTS, WEBHOOK_URL, DELIVERY_STATUS, TOP_FINDING, DELIVERY_DETAIL, SLACK_STATUS, MAIL_STATUS, WEBHOOK_STATUS, USE_AT ) VALUES ( #{deliveryId}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{actorUserId}, #{deliveryMode}, #{findingCount}, #{slackEnabled}, #{mailEnabled}, #{webhookEnabled}, #{slackChannel}, #{mailRecipients}, #{webhookUrl}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{topFinding}, #{deliveryDetail}, #{slackStatus}, #{mailStatus}, #{webhookStatus}, 'Y' )

INSERT INTO COMTNADMINNOTIFICATIONACTIVITYHIST ( ACTIVITY_ID, HAPPENED_AT, ACTION_CODE, ACTOR_USER_ID, TARGET_TEXT, DETAIL_TEXT, SOURCE_TYPE, USE_AT ) VALUES ( #{activityId}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{actionCode}, #{actorUserId}, #{targetText}, #{detailText}, #{sourceType}, 'Y' )
